2024-25 Boise State Broncos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 26-11 (14-6, 4th in MWC MBB)

Coach: Leon Rice

PS/G: 75.8 (125th of 364)

PA/G: 66.9 (41st of 364)

SRS: 13.86 (50th of 364)

SOS: 5.75 (83rd of 364)

ORtg: 113.9 (49th of 364)

DRtg: 100.6 (77th of 364)

Preseason Odds: Championship +35000
